ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Kelly, via ZOOM, for Johnnie Patterson, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding why he has failed to address the Examiner's notes. Counsel reports that he has responses to three (3) of the four (4) items sent to him by the Examiner but is having issues on how to respond to item B. Counsel provides oral testimony regarding attempting to address the issue and suggests perhaps submitting an updated proposed order to satisfy the requirement. The court advises counsel that his suggestions may satisfy the court but that he should formally submit them to the court for review and consideration.

The Accounting petition is continued to October 18, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Kelly, via ZOOM, for Johnnie Patterson, Executor.

At the outset, the court queries counsel regarding why he has failed to respond to the Examiner's notes. Counsel reports that he filed his replies, but they had been rejected because the address on his papers did not match the address in the register of actions. Counsel reports that he has been working from a different address due to the pandemic and will resubmit the replies as soon as possible. The court then directs counsel to focus on preparing and resubmitting a response to the Examiner's notes and to prepare and submit the pleadings or filings required including, but not limited to, accounting for the first two years from date of death and the request for information regarding decedent's daughters who have passed away.

The Accounting Petition is continued to August 9, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Continued To Sep-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Kelly, Esq., counsel for Johnnie Patterson, Executor (present in court).

Mr. Kelly offers oral report on the status of the estate and advises the Court that the Petition for Final Distribution will be filed this week.

The Court continues the matter to September 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. for the filing of the Petition for Final Distribution. If the Petition is filed by that date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
